caption: 🚨 Question for you… If I asked you to perform these 8 basic movement patterns today… could you do all of them with perfect form? 🤔 Most people chase fat loss, muscle gain, or strength while ignoring the FOUNDATION that determines every result. Without the right foundation: ❌ Progress slows down. ❌ Injuries increase. ❌ Performance suffers. Build these 8 movements first, and everything else becomes easier. 👇 Comment honestly: How many out of 8 can you do confidently? 🥊 Omega-3 vs Omega-9 — Which one wins? 💙 Omega-3 takes the lead. Your body can’t produce Omega-3, so you must get it from food or supplements. It supports ❤️ heart health, 🧠 brain function, 🔥 reduces inflammation, and 💪 aids recovery. Bottom line: Both are healthy fats, but Omega-3 should be your priority. 💬 Do you include Omega-3 in your daily diet?
